channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CHEMPLASTS] Sumit Maheshwari Resigns from Chemplast Sanmar Ltd Board
item.description:
Sumit Maheshwari, a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director of Chemplast Sanmar Ltd, has resigned from his position effective from the close of business hours on April 9, 2026. Maheshwari has been associated with the company since May 20, 2024, and his decision to resign is driven by the recalibration of his Board-level and professional commitments. The company has acknowledged the resignation and will complete all necessary formalities with the concerned statutory and regulatory authorities.

  • Sumit Maheshwari resigns from Chemplast Sanmar Ltd Board
  • Effective from the close of business hours on April 9, 2026
  • Maheshwari has been associated with the company since May 20, 2024
  • Resignation driven by recalibration of Board-level and professional commitments
  • Company to complete necessary formalities with statutory and regulatory authorities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Chemplast Sanmar Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NIMBSPROJ] Nimbus Projects Ltd Reports 77% YoY Growth in Q4 FY26 Pre-Sales
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nimbus Projects Limited ('Nimbus Realty'), a leading real estate developer in North India, announced strong operational performance for the fourth quarter of FY 2025–26. The Company’s pre-sales booking value stood at Rs. 281.24 crore, compared to Rs. 158.90 crore in the corresponding period last year, representing a 77% growth. Customer collections rose to Rs 100.63 crore from Rs. 45.51 crore, reflecting improved cash flow realisation and sustained demand in the residential segment. The Company reported pre-sales of Rs.545 crore and customer collections of Rs.285 crore for the FY26.

  • Nimbus Projects Ltd reports 77% YoY growth in Q4 FY26 pre-sales
  • Customer collections rose to Rs 100.63 crore from Rs. 45.51 crore
  • For the FY26, Nimbus reported pre-sales of Rs.545 crore and customer collections of Rs.285 crore
  • Improved cash flow realisation and sustained demand in the residential segment
  • Nimbus Group has established itself as a diversified real estate and infrastructure development company with a strong presence in the National Capital Region (NCR)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NIMBUS PROJECTS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [RTNINDIA] Rattanindia Enterprises Transfers Entire Shareholding in Cocoblu Retail to Neobrands Limited
item.description:
Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has transferred its entire shareholding in Cocoblu Retail Limited to Neobrands Limited, another wholly owned subsidiary of the Company. This transfer does not result in any change in the ultimate ownership or control of Cocoblu Retail Limited, which remains a wholly owned step-down subsidiary of RattanIndia Enterprises Limited.

  • Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd transfers entire shareholding in Cocoblu Retail Limited to Neobrands Limited
  • Neobrands Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of RattanIndia Enterprises Limited
  • Cocoblu Retail Limited remains a wholly owned step-down subsidiary of RattanIndia Enterprises Limited
  • Transfer does not result in any change in the ultimate ownership or control of Cocoblu Retail Limited
  • Transfer is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rattanindia Enterprises Ltd | Category: Subsidiary Transfers

item.title: [GOVAI] Ikoma Technologies Ltd: Key Personnel Resignations Approved in Board Meeting
item.description:
Ikoma Technologies Ltd announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Rahul Anandrao Bhargav, and three Non-Executive Independent Directors, Mr. Arvind Rangnarain Tiwari, Ms. Archana Chirawawala, and Mr. Sanjeev Seth. The resignations were approved in a Board meeting held on 07th April 2026. The company regrets the delay in submitting the resignation letters and assures strict compliance with all applicable provisions in the future.

  • Resignation of Mr. Rahul Anandrao Bhargav as Chief Financial Officer
  • Resignation of Mr. Arvind Rangnarain Tiwari, Ms. Archana Chirawawala, and Mr. Sanjeev Seth as Non-Executive Independent Directors
  • Resignations approved in Board meeting held on 07th April 2026
  • Company regrets delay in submitting resignation letters
  • Company assures strict compliance with all applicable provisions in the future

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOOD VALUE IRRIGATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SBRANDS] Sanghvi Brands Ltd Promoter Darpan Narendra Sanghvi Makes No Encumbrance on Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Sanghvi Brands Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares& Takeovers) Regulation, 2011, has disclosed the annual encumbrance of shares by promoter Darpan Narendra Sanghvi. The disclosure, made for the financial year ending March 31, 2026, confirms that Mr. Sanghvi did not make any encumbrance on the shares of Sanghvi Brands Limited, either directly or indirectly, during the Financial Year 2025-2026. The declaration was made by Darpan Narendra Sanghvi, who holds 5499945 Equity Shares of Sanghvi Brands Limited as on March 31, 2026.

  • Sanghvi Brands Ltd releases annual disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares& Takeovers) Regulation, 2011.
  • Promoter Darpan Narendra Sanghvi confirms no encumbrance on shares for the Financial Year 2025-2026.
  • Disclosure made for the financial year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Darpan Narendra Sanghvi holds 5499945 Equity Shares of Sanghvi Brands Limited as on March 31, 2026.
  • Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, followed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sanghvi Brands Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NECCLTD] North Eastern Carrying Corporation Ltd to Increase Authorized Share Capital
item.description:
North Eastern Carrying Corporation Ltd has announced a Board Meeting on 14th April 2026 to consider and approve an increase in the Authorized Share Capital of the company, subject to the approval of the shareholders. The Trading Window is closed from 1st April 2026 till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • North Eastern Carrying Corporation Ltd has scheduled a Board Meeting on 14th April 2026
  • The agenda includes the consideration and approval of an increase in the Authorized Share Capital
  • The approval of the shareholders is required for the proposed increase
  • The Trading Window is closed from 1st April 2026 till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results
  • The announcement is in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 read with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) (Amendment) Regulations, 2018

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NORTH EASTERN CARRYING CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WSFX] WSFx Global Pay Ltd Launches UNI-Z Digital Forex Card for International Students
item.description:
WSFx Global Pay Limited has launched the UNI-Z Digital Forex Card, a 100% digital payment solution designed specifically to facilitate pre-admission and pre-travel payments for students planning to study abroad. The card, available on the GlobalPay App, supports 12 major international currencies and offers instant digital issuance, MCC-based usage control, real-time app management, and secure transactions. The card caters to the international market and is launched in India.

  • Launch of UNI-Z Digital Forex Card for international students
  • Designed for pre-travel education-related payments
  • Supports 12 major international currencies
  • Instant digital issuance and real-time app management
  • Secure transactions with 3D Secure authentication and fraud protection

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WSFx Global Pay Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [GOVAI] Ikoma Technologies Ltd: Resignation of Key Personnel Including CFO and Independent Directors
item.description:
Ikoma Technologies Ltd, formerly known as Vuenow Infratech Limited, announced the resignation of several key personnel during a Board meeting held on April 7, 2026. The resigning personnel include Mr. Rahul Anandrao Bhargav from the position of Chief Financial Officer, and three Non-Executive Independent Directors: Mr. Arvind Rangnarain Tiwari, Ms. Archana Chirawawala, and Mr. Sanjeev Seth. The resignations were due to personal reasons and concerns about governance, statutory compliance, and information flow. The company regrets the delay in submitting the resignation letters and assures strict compliance with all applicable provisions in the future.

  • Resignation of Mr. Rahul Anandrao Bhargav as Chief Financial Officer
  • Resignation of Mr. Arvind Rangnarain Tiwari, Ms. Archana Chirawawala, and Mr. Sanjeev Seth as Non-Executive Independent Directors
  • Resignations due to personal reasons and concerns about governance and statutory compliance
  • Company regrets delay in submitting resignation letters
  • Company assures strict compliance with all applicable provisions in the future

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOOD VALUE IRRIGATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INTENTECH] Intense Technologies Ltd Clarifies Significant Price Movement Unrelated to Company's Operations
item.description:
Intense Technologies Ltd has issued a clarification letter regarding the significant price movement in the company's shares. The company stated that there is no additional information or announcement that could have a bearing on the price/volume behavior of the shares. The company's management is not connected with the increase in price/volume of the shares, which is purely due to market conditions and absolutely market driven. The company has been regularly disseminating price sensitive information as required by regulations.

  • Intense Technologies Ltd clarifies price movement of shares
  • No additional information or announcement from the company
  • Price movement attributed to market conditions
  • Company's management not connected with price movement
  • Regular dissemination of price sensitive information by the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INTENSE TECHNOLOGIES LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [POONAWALLA] Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd Reports Interim Condensed Financial Statements for Dec 2025
item.description:
Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd has released its interim condensed financial statements for the period ending December 31, 2025. The statements were approved by the Committee of Directors and recommended by the Audit Committee. The trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company was closed for all 'Designated Persons' as per the SEBI regulations and the Company's Code of Conduct. The statements were prepared in accordance with the Indian Accounting Standard 34 and other recognized accounting principles generally accepted in India.

  • Interim condensed financial statements for Dec 2025 approved by the Committee of Directors
  • Trading window closed for all 'Designated Persons' as per SEBI regulations and the Company's Code of Conduct
  • Statements prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standard 34 and other recognized accounting principles

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Poonawalla Fincorp Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
